title: OpenAI Seeks Community Support for Data Centers: Commitment to Not Increase Electricity Bills, Extremely Low Water Usage
excerpt: The opposition to AI infrastructure across the United States has prompted OpenAI to adopt a softer approach this time. According to a July 23 report by Business
content_html:
The opposition to AI infrastructure across the United States has prompted OpenAI to adopt a softer approach this time. According to a July 23 report by Business Insider, OpenAI is seeking community support for a large data center in Georgia, launching a new initiative called Project Camellia—a data center campus that will be built on about 567 hectares of land in the rural area of Effingham County, Savannah, with an investment of at least $2 billion and an electricity demand of 3.2 gigawatts.

OpenAI states that the team has already communicated with state and local officials, community leaders, schools, and others, listened to their opinions, and will hold public meetings in the future. The company emphasizes that early engagement with the community is the right way to build trust, as the project is still in the early development stage, and there is a lot of work to be done on infrastructure, construction schedule, design, financing, and operational models. Effingham County Commissioner Jamie Drollinger also publicly stated that the team raised sharp questions and confirmed that the project will use very little water, will not increase energy costs for local residents, and will bring new taxes to support schools and create more opportunities for local businesses.

A power supply contract has already been signed with Georgia Power. The 567-hectare campus will be powered in phases from 2028 to 2032. At the same time, OpenAI has outlined four commitments to directly address the long-standing issues that often spark neighborhood resistance—issues that are the main reasons for opposition to data center construction elsewhere.

The commitments clearly state: the project will not increase electricity bills for local residents; the closed-loop water system used by the campus will keep water usage at an extremely low level. Georgia families will not bear the cost of the project; all infrastructure and electricity service fees required for power supply will be fully covered by OpenAI. This campus will also be among the first data centers that can actively reduce their own power consumption during peak times, avoiding the impact on residential users. Money has also been put forward: throughout the entire operation cycle, OpenAI plans to contribute $80 million to the community, and provide a total of $71 million in Codex usage credits for students at eligible Georgia universities, community colleges, and technical schools—each qualified student will be able to receive a $100 Codex credit through their own ChatGPT account.

To ensure these commitments are not empty words, an independent institution will audit OpenAI's compliance annually and make the results public. Once the campus is fully completed, it is expected to create thousands of construction jobs and over 1,000 long-term operational positions. While placing computing power in the countryside, OpenAI clearly aims to first settle people's hearts.

blocks.html_en: The opposition to AI infrastructure across the United States has prompted OpenAI to adopt a softer approach this time. According to a July 23 report by Business Insider, OpenAI is seeking community support for a large data center in Georgia, launching a new initiative called Project Camellia—a data center campus that will be built on about 567 hectares of land in the rural area of Effingham County, Savannah, with an investment of at least $2 billion and an electricity demand of 3.2 gigawatts.

sentences.en: The opposition to AI infrastructure across the United States has prompted OpenAI to adopt a softer approach this time.
sentences.zh: 美国各地对人工智能基础设施的反对促使OpenAI这次采取了更为温和的做法。

sentences.en: According to a July 23 report by Business Insider, OpenAI is seeking community support for a large data center in Georgia, launching a new initiative called Project Camellia—a data center campus that will be built on about 567 hectares of land in the rural area of Effingham County, Savannah, with an investment of at least $2 billion and an electricity demand of 3.2 gigawatts.
sentences.zh: 据 Business Insider 7 月 23 日报道，OpenAI 正在为佐治亚州的大型数据中心寻求社区支持，启动了一项名为 Project Camellia 的新举措——将在萨凡纳埃芬汉县农村地区约 567 公顷的土地上建设一个数据中心园区，投资至少 20 亿美元，电力需求为 3.2 吉瓦。

blocks.html_en: OpenAI states that the team has already communicated with state and local officials, community leaders, schools, and others, listened to their opinions, and will hold public meetings in the future. The company emphasizes that early engagement with the community is the right way to build trust, as the project is still in the early development stage, and there is a lot of work to be done on infrastructure, construction schedule, design, financing, and operational models. Effingham County Commissioner Jamie Drollinger also publicly stated that the team raised sharp questions and confirmed that the project will use very little water, will not increase energy costs for local residents, and will bring new taxes to support schools and create more opportunities for local businesses.

sentences.en: OpenAI states that the team has already communicated with state and local officials, community leaders, schools, and others, listened to their opinions, and will hold public meetings in the future.
sentences.zh: OpenAI表示，团队已经与州和地方官员、社区领袖、学校等进行了沟通，听取了他们的意见，并将在未来召开公开会议。

sentences.en: The company emphasizes that early engagement with the community is the right way to build trust, as the project is still in the early development stage, and there is a lot of work to be done on infrastructure, construction schedule, design, financing, and operational models.
sentences.zh: 该公司强调，尽早与社区接触是建立信任的正确方式，因为该项目仍处于早期开发阶段，在基础设施、施工进度、设计、融资和运营模式等方面还有大量工作要做。

sentences.en: Effingham County Commissioner Jamie Drollinger also publicly stated that the team raised sharp questions and confirmed that the project will use very little water, will not increase energy costs for local residents, and will bring new taxes to support schools and create more opportunities for local businesses.
sentences.zh: 埃芬汉县专员杰米·德罗林格也公开表示，团队提出了尖锐的问题，并确认该项目将使用很少的水，不会增加当地居民的能源成本，并将带来新的税收来支持学校，并为当地企业创造更多机会。

At the same time, OpenAI has outlined four commitments to directly address the long-standing issues that often spark neighborhood resistance—issues that are the main reasons for opposition to data center construction elsewhere.

sentences.en: A power supply contract has already been signed with Georgia Power.
sentences.zh: 已与佐治亚电力公司签署了供电合同。

sentences.en: The 567-hectare campus will be powered in phases from 2028 to 2032.
sentences.zh: 占地 567 公顷的园区将于 2028 年至 2032 年分阶段供电。

sentences.en: At the same time, OpenAI has outlined four commitments to directly address the long-standing issues that often spark neighborhood resistance—issues that are the main reasons for opposition to data center construction elsewhere.
sentences.zh: 与此同时，OpenAI 概述了四项承诺，以直接解决经常引发社区抵制的长期存在的问题，这些问题是反对其他地方数据中心建设的主要原因。

blocks.html_en: The commitments clearly state: the project will not increase electricity bills for local residents; the closed-loop water system used by the campus will keep water usage at an extremely low level. Georgia families will not bear the cost of the project; all infrastructure and electricity service fees required for power supply will be fully covered by OpenAI. This campus will also be among the first data centers that can actively reduce their own power consumption during peak times, avoiding the impact on residential users. Money has also been put forward: throughout the entire operation cycle, OpenAI plans to contribute $80 million to the community, and provide a total of $71 million in Codex usage credits for students at eligible Georgia universities, community colleges, and technical schools—each qualified student will be able to receive a $100 Codex credit through their own ChatGPT account.

sentences.en: The commitments clearly state: the project will not increase electricity bills for local residents; the closed-loop water system used by the campus will keep water usage at an extremely low level.
sentences.zh: 承诺明确：项目不会增加当地居民电费；校园使用的闭环供水系统将使用水量保持在极低的水平。

sentences.en: Georgia families will not bear the cost of the project; all infrastructure and electricity service fees required for power supply will be fully covered by OpenAI.
sentences.zh: 乔治亚州家庭将不承担该项目的费用；供电所需的所有基础设施费和电力服务费将由 OpenAI 全额承担。

sentences.en: This campus will also be among the first data centers that can actively reduce their own power consumption during peak times, avoiding the impact on residential users.
sentences.zh: 该园区也将成为首批能够在高峰时段主动降低自身能耗的数据中心之一，避免对居民用户造成影响。

sentences.en: Money has also been put forward: throughout the entire operation cycle, OpenAI plans to contribute $80 million to the community, and provide a total of $71 million in Codex usage credits for students at eligible Georgia universities, community colleges, and technical schools—each qualified student will be able to receive a $100 Codex credit through their own ChatGPT account.
sentences.zh: 资金也已提出：在整个运营周期中，OpenAI 计划向社区贡献 8000 万美元，并为符合条件的佐治亚州大学、社区学院和技术学校的学生提供总计 7100 万美元的 Codex 使用积分——每个符合条件的学生将能够通过自己的 ChatGPT 账户获得 100 美元的 Codex 使用积分。

blocks.html_en: To ensure these commitments are not empty words, an independent institution will audit OpenAI's compliance annually and make the results public. Once the campus is fully completed, it is expected to create thousands of construction jobs and over 1,000 long-term operational positions. While placing computing power in the countryside, OpenAI clearly aims to first settle people's hearts.

sentences.en: To ensure these commitments are not empty words, an independent institution will audit OpenAI's compliance annually and make the results public.
sentences.zh: 为了确保这些承诺不是空话，独立机构将每年对 OpenAI 的合规性进行审核并将结果公开。

sentences.en: Once the campus is fully completed, it is expected to create thousands of construction jobs and over 1,000 long-term operational positions.
sentences.zh: 园区全面竣工后，预计将创造数千个建筑工作岗位和 1,000 多个长期运营岗位。

sentences.en: While placing computing power in the countryside, OpenAI clearly aims to first settle people's hearts.
sentences.zh: OpenAI把算力下乡的同时，明确的目标是先安民心。

content_html_zh:
美国各地对人工智能基础设施的反对促使OpenAI这次采取了更为温和的做法。 据 Business Insider 7 月 23 日报道，OpenAI 正在为佐治亚州的大型数据中心寻求社区支持，启动了一项名为 Project Camellia 的新举措——将在萨凡纳埃芬汉县农村地区约 567 公顷的土地上建设一个数据中心园区，投资至少 20 亿美元，电力需求为 3.2 吉瓦。

OpenAI表示，团队已经与州和地方官员、社区领袖、学校等进行了沟通，听取了他们的意见，并将在未来召开公开会议。 该公司强调，尽早与社区接触是建立信任的正确方式，因为该项目仍处于早期开发阶段，在基础设施、施工进度、设计、融资和运营模式等方面还有大量工作要做。 埃芬汉县专员杰米·德罗林格也公开表示，团队提出了尖锐的问题，并确认该项目将使用很少的水，不会增加当地居民的能源成本，并将带来新的税收来支持学校，并为当地企业创造更多机会。

已与佐治亚电力公司签署了供电合同。 占地 567 公顷的园区将于 2028 年至 2032 年分阶段供电。 与此同时，OpenAI 概述了四项承诺，以直接解决经常引发社区抵制的长期存在的问题，这些问题是反对其他地方数据中心建设的主要原因。

承诺明确：项目不会增加当地居民电费；校园使用的闭环供水系统将使用水量保持在极低的水平。 乔治亚州家庭将不承担该项目的费用；供电所需的所有基础设施费和电力服务费将由 OpenAI 全额承担。 该园区也将成为首批能够在高峰时段主动降低自身能耗的数据中心之一，避免对居民用户造成影响。 资金也已提出：在整个运营周期中，OpenAI 计划向社区贡献 8000 万美元，并为符合条件的佐治亚州大学、社区学院和技术学校的学生提供总计 7100 万美元的 Codex 使用积分——每个符合条件的学生将能够通过自己的 ChatGPT 账户获得 100 美元的 Codex 使用积分。

为了确保这些承诺不是空话，独立机构将每年对 OpenAI 的合规性进行审核并将结果公开。 园区全面竣工后，预计将创造数千个建筑工作岗位和 1,000 多个长期运营岗位。 OpenAI把算力下乡的同时，明确的目标是先安民心。
